title: Mi enemigo y yo
writer: Luisa-María Linares, Aureliano Campa, Ramón Quadreny
actors: Josita Hernán, Luis Prendes, Leonor Fábregas
plot: Two sisters living with their aunt in a mountain village are fond of a writer whom they have the chance to meet, both of them falling in love with him. When he proposes to one sister, not wanting to hurt the other she is ready to ...
